title: तेरे बिना प्रभु
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: Without me ye can do nothing
Whom have I in heaven but thee? and there is none upon earth that I desire beside thee

story: A tender devotional bhajan expressing complete dependence on God. This hymn speaks to the heart of every believer who has known loneliness and found solace only in the Lord. Widely sung in Hindi-speaking churches and home prayer meetings, its gentle melody and honest lyrics have brought comfort to countless believers.

lines: तेरे बिना प्रभु जी नहीं सकते
तेरे बिना प्रभु कुछ नहीं कर सकते
linesRomanized: Tere bina Prabhu jee nahin sakte
Tere bina Prabhu kuchh nahin kar sakte

lines: जब राह कोई नज़र नहीं आता
तू ही दीपक बनकर आता है
linesRomanized: Jab raah koi nazar nahin aataa
Tu hi deepak bankar aataa hai

lines: तू ही सब कुछ है मेरा प्रभु
तू ही आशा तू ही सहारा
इस जीवन में और उस पार भी
linesRomanized: Tu hi sab kuchh hai mera Prabhu
Tu hi aashaa tu hi sahaaraa
Is jeevan mein aur us paar bhi
